description: CompositionBlue checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, front buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a mid sleeve buttoned flap, patch pocket on the left chest with a buttoned flap, branding embroidered above the pocket and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsProudly display your fashion sense with this checked shirt from locomotive. The long sleeves accentuate your well-toned arms, you can fold your sleeves to suit your mood, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that perfect casual look.Model statisticsThe product is a size L on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
